description: Standard custom field definitions for SalesMfast GHL contacts

signal_score.description: Current engagement/intent score based on signal analysis
signal_score.updated_by: n8n signal scoring workflow or manual

scoring_guide.4-6: Warm — some engagement but not ready to buy
scoring_guide.9-10: Very Hot — explicit intent, ready to meet/buy

signal_source.description: What triggered the most recent signal

last_signal_date.description: When the last engagement signal was detected
last_signal_date.used_for: Signal freshness checks — signals >90 days old are considered stale

enrichment_status.description: Status of Clay data enrichment for this contact

company_revenue.description: Annual revenue range from Clay enrichment

tech_stack.description: Comma-separated list of technologies used by the company

linkedin_url.description: LinkedIn profile URL for cross-platform matching

budget_range.updated_by: Qualification call notes or form submission

icp_fit_score.description: How well this contact matches their assigned ICP

campaign_name.description: Name of the outbound campaign that generated this lead

meeting_date.description: Date/time of the next scheduled meeting

loss_reason.description: Why the deal was lost (required for Closed Lost opportunities)

country.description: Contact's country, derived from phone prefix or enrichment

decision_maker.description: Whether this contact is a decision maker (has budget authority)
decision_maker.auto_detect: Titles containing CEO, CTO, VP, Director, Head, Owner, Founder
